title: BM: More Geodes
description: Adds Ore geodes and other special types of geodes!
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/BtOT1Zs.png) **BM: More Geodes** adds themed variants of the vanilla amethyst geode. You can find balanced ore geodes for each vanilla ore, as well as special slime, ice, and honey geodes. Each type is carefully adjusted for rarity, size, and the number of rare blocks to keep BM: More Geodes balanced and fitting with vanilla and modded gameplay. This datapack is compatible with almost all world generation mods and other datapacks, as long as they do not modify the _placed_feature_ file for the vanilla amethyst geode. No incompatibilities have been found so far. This is a major improvement over my previous Ore Geodes datapack, which was only compatible with specific world generation mods. ### List of all geodes so far: - Coal - Copper - Iron - Gold - Redstone - Lapis - Diamond - Emerald - Slime - Ice - Honey - Amethyst (Default) Use a mod like Global Packs to automatically load downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders, when using the CurseForge launcher.
